title: senecio vulcanicus
intro: Senecio vulcanicus, also known as Vulcan's Pride, is a plant species in the daisy family native to New Zealand. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Senecio vulcanicus have been reported to aid in treating various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, infusions, or salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential liver toxicity.
